results.rendered_html:
niḥsattva (nis + sa˚) adj.
1〉 dem es an Muth, an Kraft gebricht, schwach, elend, erbärmlich: tasya śaṅkhasya nādena dhanuṣo nisvanena ca . niḥmattvāśca sasattvāśca kṣitau petustadā janāḥ ..  MBH. 7,3882 . niḥsattvasyālpavīryasya  R. 3,27,14 .  HIT. I, 128 .  VP. 72, N.   BHĀG. P. 1,4,17 . 3,30,12 . 8,5,19 . 8,29 . 19,3 . aho kimapi niḥsattvaṃ rājatvaṃ vata vāsukeḥ . yatsvahastena nīyante riporāmiṣatāṃ prajāḥ ..  KATHĀS. 22,211 . der Wesenheit ermangelnd: sarvadharmāḥ  VYUTP. 5 .
— 2〉 der lebenden Wesen beraubt: mayā prātarniḥsattvaṃ vanaṃ kartavyam  PAÑCAT. 55,8 .
